_description: Maps research field categories to SharePoint page paths. Edit spPath values to match your SharePoint instance. Do not rename the top-level keys — they correspond to research intelligence category names.
_instructions: Replace 'your-tenant' with your actual SharePoint tenant name. The spPath values are relative to _baseUrl.

identity.description: Official website, organizer name, edition number, hashtags

dates.description: Setup/teardown dates, venue address, GPS coordinates

booth.description: Booth deadlines, pricing, cancellation policy, prospectus PDF

sponsorship.description: Sponsorship tiers, pricing, benefits, logo spec requirements

housing.description: Hotel block name, housing deadline, booking portal, hotel options

attendance.description: Expected attendee/exhibitor counts, prior year figures, target audience

contacts.description: Exhibits manager, sponsorship contact, press contact

opportunities.description: Speaking opportunities, deadlines, awards programs, co-located events
